summary: Tested buyer cancellation functionality and seller rating display. All features working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified.
passed_tests: Backend: Buyer cancel returns 404 for non-existent auction
Backend: Buyer cancel returns 403 if auction not won by user
Backend: GET /api/users/me/won returns buyer's won auctions
Backend: Auctions include seller_rating and seller_rating_count fields
Backend: Auction detail includes seller rating data
Backend: Buyer dashboard endpoints all return 200
Frontend: Homepage loads with auction cards showing seller ratings
Frontend: Auction cards display star icon with 'No reviews yet' or rating value
Frontend: Seller rating displayed prominently below seller name
Frontend: Buyer dashboard shows 'Won Auctions' section
Frontend: Cancel Order buttons visible for unpaid orders
Frontend: Cancel Order dialog opens with correct elements
Frontend: Dialog shows warning message about account restrictions
Frontend: Dialog has reason textarea field
Frontend: Dialog has 'Keep Order' and 'Cancel Order' buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Buyer cancel endpoint properly validates winner_id before allowing cancellation
Buyer cancel endpoint checks for suspension status before processing
Buyer cancel endpoint records cancellation for suspension tracking
Seller rating display correctly shows 'No reviews yet' when seller_rating is 0
Seller rating display shows rating value with star icon when reviews exist
Cancel Order dialog includes warning about frequent cancellations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Buyer cancellation feature fully working: Cancel Order buttons appear in Won Auctions section for unpaid orders, clicking opens dialog with reason field and warning message, backend endpoint validates winner and tracks cancellations. Seller rating display working: star icon with rating value or 'No reviews yet' shown below seller name on auction cards.

buyer_cancel_order_button.details: Cancel Order buttons appear in Won Auctions section for unpaid orders with data-testid='buyer-cancel-{auction_id}'

buyer_cancel_dialog.details: Dialog opens with title, confirmation message, warning about restrictions, reason textarea, and Keep Order/Cancel Order buttons

buyer_cancel_backend.details: POST /api/buyers/orders/{auction_id}/cancel validates winner, checks suspension, records cancellation, handles refunds

seller_rating_display.details: Auction cards show star icon with rating value (e.g., '4.5') and review count, or 'No reviews yet' for sellers without reviews

seller_rating_position.details: Rating displayed prominently below seller name with verified badge
